query:
UPDATE sync_logs 
SET status = 'error', 
    error_message = 'Force stopped: stuck in customers stage for >5 hours',
    finished_at = NOW()
WHERE section = 'Boonphone' 
  AND status = 'in_progress'
  AND started_at >= '2026-05-07 10:00:00';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute 
UPDATE sync_logs 
SET status = 'error', 
    error_message = 'Force stopped: stuck in customers stage for >5 hours',
    finished_at = NOW()
WHERE section = 'Boonphone' 
  AND status = 'in_progress'
  AND started_at >= '2026-05-07 10:00:00';
